turns.name: WILLIAM H. REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 86-7059, Patterson against Illinois will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: BYRON R. WHITE
turns.text: In this case, we affirm the judgment of the Supreme Court of Illinois. Illinois -- Justice Blackmun has filed a dissenting opinion and has Justice Stevens who is joined by Justices Brennan and Marshall.
